message:
feat(web): add skeleton loading to SearchOverlay during worker init

Add loading skeleton while search worker initializes to improve perceived
performance and eliminate blank/jarring state when opening search overlay.

Changes:

- search.worker.ts:
  - Add ping() method for SearchOverlay to verify worker readiness
  - Method returns true immediately, used to detect init completion

- types.ts:
  - Add ping() to SearchWorkerAPI interface

- SearchOverlay.tsx:
  - Add workerReady state to track worker initialization
  - Call ping() after Comlink.wrap to verify worker is responsive
  - Show SearchResultsSkeleton while worker or sequence is loading
  - Hide mode selector and query input until initialization complete
  - Use isInitializing flag to consolidate loading state logic
  - Add proper ARIA attributes (aria-busy, aria-label) for accessibility

The skeleton provides visual feedback during the 200-500ms worker init
delay on slower devices, improving perceived responsiveness.

Implements: phage_explorer-kin1
